  "file": {
    "content": "/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::RefCell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse servo_arc::Arc;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLockReadGuard, ToCssWithGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, MediaRule};\nuse style_traits::ToCss;\n\nuse super::cssconditionrule::CSSConditionRule;\nuse super::cssrule::SpecificCSSRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSMediaRuleBinding::CSSMediaRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::{DomGlobal, reflect_dom_object};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{DomRoot, MutNullableDom};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::medialist::MediaList;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSMediaRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    mediarule: RefCell<Arc<MediaRule>>,\n    medialist: MutNullableDom<MediaList>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSMediaRule {\n    fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet, mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>) -> CSSMediaRule {\n        let list = mediarule.rules.clone();\n        CSSMediaRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            mediarule: RefCell::new(mediarule),\n            medialist: MutNullableDom::new(None),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSMediaRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSMediaRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, mediarule)),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    fn medialist(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> DomRoot<MediaList> {\n        self.medialist.or_init(|| {\n            MediaList::new(\n                self.global().as_window(),\n                self.cssconditionrule.parent_stylesheet(),\n                self.mediarule.borrow().media_queries.clone(),\n                can_gc,\n            )\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#the-cssmediarule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.mediarule\n            .borrow()\n            .media_queries\n            .read_with(&guard)\n            .to_css_string()\n            .into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(mediarule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        if let Some(medialist) = self.medialist.get() {\n            medialist.update_media_list(mediarule.media_queries.clone());\n        }\n        *self.mediarule.borrow_mut() = mediarule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSMediaRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Media\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.mediarule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSMediaRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSMediaRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-media>",

style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLockReadGuard, ToCssWithGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, SupportsRule};\nuse style_traits::ToCss;\n\nuse super::cssconditionrule::CSSConditionRule;\nuse super::cssrule::SpecificCSSRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::reflect_dom_object;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::DomRoot;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSSupportsRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    supportsrule: RefCell<Arc<SupportsRule>>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSSupportsRule {\n    fn new_inherited(\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        supportsrule: Arc<SupportsRule>,\n    ) -> CSSSupportsRule {\n        let list = supportsrule.rules.clone();\n        CSSSupportsRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            supportsrule: RefCell::new(supportsrule),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        supportsrule: Arc<SupportsRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSSupportsRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSSupportsRule::new_inherited(\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                supportsrule,\n            )),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#the-csssupportsrule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.supportsrule.borrow().condition.to_css_string().into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(\n        &self,\n        supportsrule: Arc<SupportsRule>,\n        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    ) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(supportsrule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        *self.supportsrule.borrow_mut() = supportsrule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSSupportsRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Supports\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.supportsrule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    }\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/components/script/dom/css/csssupportsrule.rs",
    "numLines": 84,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 84
  },
  "type": "text"
}

super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet\u2019s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n 197. Edit @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/logs/agent/sessions/projects/-workspace/memory/MEMORY.md",
  "new_string": "## Implementation Status\n\n### What's Already There\n- Stylo has `StyleCssRule::Container` variant defined\n- ContainerSizeQuery type exists in Stylo\n- Preference flag for container queries in config/prefs.rs\n- Devtools stub for container_type info\n\n### What Needs Implementation\n- CSSContainerRule.webidl (WebIDL interface definition)\n- CSSContainerRule.rs (DOM wrapper, similar to CSSMediaRule/CSSSupportsRule)\n- Update cssrule.rs new_specific() and update_rule() to handle Container\n- Add CSSContainerRule to as_specific() match\n- Implement query_container_size in ServoLayoutElement\n- Enable container query evaluation in layout\n\n### Key Implementation Details\n- Follow CSSSupportsRule pattern (simpler than CSSMediaRule)\n- Use CSSConditionRule as base class\n- Import ContainerRule from style::stylesheets\n- Add to CSSRule dispatcher in cssrule.rs\n- Create WebIDL binding file",
  "old_string": "## Next Steps\n1. Understand Stylo crate structure\n2. Check if container queries already partially implemented\n3. Implement missing parts in Stylo\n4. Run tests to verify implementation",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/logs/agent/sessions/projects/-workspace/memory/MEMORY.md",
  "newString": "## Implementation Status\n\n### What's Already There\n- Stylo has `StyleCssRule::Container` variant defined\n- ContainerSizeQuery type exists in Stylo\n- Preference flag for container queries in config/prefs.rs\n- Devtools stub for container_type info\n\n### What Needs Implementation\n- CSSContainerRule.webidl (WebIDL interface definition)\n- CSSContainerRule.rs (DOM wrapper, similar to CSSMediaRule/CSSSupportsRule)\n- Update cssrule.rs new_specific() and update_rule() to handle Container\n- Add CSSContainerRule to as_specific() match\n- Implement query_container_size in ServoLayoutElement\n- Enable container query evaluation in layout\n\n### Key Implementation Details\n- Follow CSSSupportsRule pattern (simpler than CSSMediaRule)\n- Use CSSConditionRule as base class\n- Import ContainerRule from style::stylesheets\n- Add to CSSRule dispatcher in cssrule.rs\n- Create WebIDL binding file",
  "oldString": "## Next Steps\n1. Understand Stylo crate structure\n2. Check if container queries already partially implemented\n3. Implement missing parts in Stylo\n4. Run tests to verify implementation",
  "originalFile": "# Container Queries Implementation Progress\n\n## Project Context\n- Implementing CSS Container Queries in Servo browser\n- Tests are in `/workspace/tests/wpt/tests/css/css-conditional/container-queries/`\n- Over 300+ test files covering various aspects\n\n## Architecture\n- Servo uses **Stylo** as its CSS engine (external crate from https://github.com/servo/stylo)\n- Stylo is imported as a git dependency in Cargo.toml (line 178)\n- Style system is NOT in workspace components but in external stylo crate\n\n## Required Features to Implement\n1. `container-type` CSS property (values: normal, size, inline-size, scroll-state)\n2. `container-name` CSS property (values: none or custom idents)\n3. `@container` at-rule parsing with conditions\n4. Size query evaluation (min-width, max-width, width, height, etc.)\n5. Comparison operators: <, <=, =, >=, >\n6. Container relative units: cqi, cqw, cqh, cqb, cqmin, cqmax\n7. Style queries with style() function\n8. Scroll state queries\n\n## Test Files\n- **Parsing tests:** container-parsing.html, container-type-parsing.html\n- **At-rule tests:** at-container-parsing.html, at-container-serialization.html\n- **Size features:** size-feature-evaluation.html, aspect-ratio-feature-evaluation.html\n- **Units:** container-units-basic.html\n- **Invalidation:** Multiple invalidation tests\n- **Shadow DOM:** container-for-shadow-dom.html\n- **Total:** 314 test files\n\n## Testing Infrastructure\n- Uses testharness.js (JavaScript test framework)\n- Key functions from cq-testcommon.js:\n  - `assert_implements_size_container_queries()` - checks CSS.supports(\"container-type:size\")\n  - `test_cq_rule_valid/invalid()` - validates @container parsing\n  - `test_cq_condition_known/unknown()` - validates conditions\n  - `getComputedStyle()` - checks computed values\n\n## Next Steps\n1. Understand Stylo crate structure\n2. Check if container queries already partially implemented\n3. Implement missing parts in Stylo\n4. Run tests to verify implementation\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   - `test_cq_condition_known/unknown()` - validates conditions",
        "   - `getComputedStyle()` - checks computed values",
        " ",
        "-## Next Steps",
        "-1. Understand Stylo crate structure",
        "-2. Check if container queries already partially implemented",
        "-3. Implement missing parts in Stylo",
        "-4. Run tests to verify implementation",
        "+## Implementation Status",
        "+",
        "+### What's Already There",
        "+- Stylo has `StyleCssRule::Container` variant defined",
        "+- ContainerSizeQuery type exists in Stylo",
        "+- Preference flag for container queries in config/prefs.rs",
        "+- Devtools stub for container_type info",
        "+",
        "+### What Needs Implementation",
        "+- CSSContainerRule.webidl (WebIDL interface definition)",
        "+- CSSContainerRule.rs (DOM wrapper, similar to CSSMediaRule/CSSSupportsRule)",
        "+- Update cssrule.rs new_specific() and update_rule() to handle Container",
        "+- Add CSSContainerRule to as_specific() match",
        "+- Implement query_container_size in ServoLayoutElement",
        "+- Enable container query evaluation in layout",
        "+",
        "+### Key Implementation Details",
        "+- Follow CSSSupportsRule pattern (simpler than CSSMediaRule)",
        "+- Use CSSConditionRule as base class",
        "+- Import ContainerRule from style::stylesheets",
        "+- Add to CSSRule dispatcher in cssrule.rs",
        "+- Create WebIDL binding file"
      ],
      "newLines": 25,
      "newStart": 37,
      "oldLines": 8,
      "oldStart": 37
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

199. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::RefCell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse servo_arc::Arc;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLockReadGuard, ToCssWithGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, ContainerRule};\nuse style_traits::ToCss;\n\nuse super::cssconditionrule::CSSConditionRule;\nuse super::cssrule::SpecificCSSRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSContainerRuleBinding::CSSContainerRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::reflect_dom_object;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::DomRoot;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSContainerRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    containerrule: RefCell<Arc<ContainerRule>>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRule {\n    fn new_inherited(\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n    ) -> CSSContainerRule {\n        let list = containerrule.rules.clone();\n        CSSContainerRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            containerrule: RefCell::new(containerrule),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSContainerRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSContainerRule::new_inherited(\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                containerrule,\n            )),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional/#the-csscontainerrule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.containerrule.borrow().condition.to_css_string().into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn get_container_query(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.containerrule.borrow().condition.to_css_string().into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(\n        &self,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    ) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(containerrule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        *self.containerrule.borrow_mut() = containerrule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSContainerRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Container\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssconditionrule-conditiontext>\n    fn GetConditionText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.get_condition_text()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-cssrules>\n    fn CssRules(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> crate::dom::bindings::root::DomRoot<crate::dom::css::CSSRuleList> {\n Result<u32, crate::dom::bindings::error::Error> {\n        self.cssconditionrule.insert_rule(&rule, index, can_gc)\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-deleterule>\n If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::RefCell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse servo_arc::Arc;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLockReadGuard, ToCssWithGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, ContainerRule};\nuse style_traits::ToCss;\n\nuse super::cssconditionrule::CSSConditionRule;\nuse super::cssrule::SpecificCSSRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSContainerRuleBinding::CSSContainerRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::reflect_dom_object;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::DomRoot;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSContainerRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    containerrule: RefCell<Arc<ContainerRule>>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRule {\n    fn new_inherited(\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n    ) -> CSSContainerRule {\n        let list = containerrule.rules.clone();\n        CSSContainerRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            containerrule: RefCell::new(containerrule),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSContainerRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSContainerRule::new_inherited(\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                containerrule,\n            )),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional/#the-csscontainerrule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.containerrule.borrow().condition.to_css_string().into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn get_container_query(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.containerrule.borrow().condition.to_css_string().into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(\n        &self,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    ) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(containerrule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        *self.containerrule.borrow_mut() = containerrule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSContainerRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Container\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.containerrule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSContainerRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional/#dom-csscontainerrule-containerquery>\n    fn ContainerQuery(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.get_container_query()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssconditionrule-conditiontext>\n    fn GetConditionText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.get_condition_text()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-cssrules>\n    fn CssRules(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> crate::dom::bindings::root::DomRoot<crate::dom::css::CSSRuleList> {\n        self.cssconditionrule.css_rules(can_gc)\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-insertrule>\n    fn InsertRule(&self, rule: DOMString, index: u32, can_gc: CanGc) -> Result<u32, crate::dom::bindings::error::Error> {\n        self.cssconditionrule.insert_rule(&rule, index, can_gc)\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-deleterule>\n    fn DeleteRule(&self, index: u32) -> Result<(), crate::dom::bindings::error::Error> {\n        self.cssconditionrule.delete_rule(index)\n    }\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::Cell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet\u2019s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::Cell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::csscontainerrule::CSSContainerRule;\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet\u2019s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n",

super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet\u2019s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSContainerRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n            if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n",

crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet\u2019s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n",

215. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/components/script_bindings/build.rs"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::fs::File;\nuse std::io::Write;\nuse std::path::PathBuf;\nuse std::process::Command;\nuse std::time::Instant;\nuse std::{env, fmt};\n\nuse phf_shared::{self, FmtConst};\nuse serde_json::{self, Value};\n\nfn main() {\n    let start = Instant::now();\n\n    let style_out_dir = PathBuf::from(env::var_os(\"DEP_SERVO_STYLE_CRATE_OUT_DIR\").unwrap());\n    let css_properties_json = style_out_dir.join(\"css-properties.json\");\n    let out_dir = PathBuf::from(env::var_os(\"OUT_DIR\").unwrap());\n\n    println!(\"cargo:out_dir={}\", out_dir.display());\n\n    println!(\"cargo::rerun-if-changed=webidls\");\n    println!(\"cargo::rerun-if-changed=codegen\");\n    println!(\"cargo::rerun-if-changed={}\", css_properties_json.display());\n    println!(\"cargo::rerun-if-changed=../../third_party/WebIDL/WebIDL.py\");\n    // NB: We aren't handling changes in `third_party/ply` here.\n\n    let status = find_python()\n        .arg(\"codegen/run.py\")\n        .arg(&css_properties_json)\n        .arg(&out_dir)\n        .status()\n        .unwrap();\n    if !status.success() {\n        std::process::exit(1)\n    }\n\n    println!(\"Binding generation completed in {:?}\", start.elapsed());\n\n    let json = out_dir.join(\"InterfaceObjectMapData.json\");\n    let json: Value = serde_json::from_reader(File::open(json).unwrap()).unwrap();\n    let mut map = phf_codegen::Map::new();\n    for (key, value) in json.as_object().unwrap() {\n        let parts = value.as_array().unwrap();\n        map.entry(\n            Bytes(key),\n            format!(\n                \"Interface {{ define: {}, enabled: {} }}\",\n                parts[0].as_str().unwrap(),\n                parts[1].as_str().unwrap()\n            ),\n        );\n    }\n    let phf = PathBuf::from(env::var_os(\"OUT_DIR\").unwrap()).join(\"InterfaceObjectMapPhf.rs\");\n    let mut phf = File::create(phf).unwrap();\n    writeln!(\n        &mut phf,\n        \"pub(crate) static MAP: phf::Map<&'static [u8], Interface> = {};\",\n        map.build(),\n    )\n    .unwrap();\n}\n\n#[derive(Eq, Hash, PartialEq)]\nstruct Bytes<'a>(&'a str);\n\nimpl FmtConst for Bytes<'_> {\n    fn fmt_const(&self, formatter: &mut fmt::Formatter) -> fmt::Result {\n        write!(formatter, \"b\\\"{}\\\"\", self.0)\n    }\n}\n\nimpl phf_shared::PhfHash for Bytes<'_> {\n    fn phf_hash<H: std::hash::Hasher>(&self, hasher: &mut H) {\n        self.0.as_bytes().phf_hash(hasher)\n    }\n}\n\nfn try_python_command(mut command: Command) -> Result<Command, String> {\n    let command_result = command.output();\n\n    if let Ok(output) = command_result {\n        return if output.status.success() {\n            Ok(command)\n        } else {\n            Err(format!(\n                \"`{command:?}` failed with {}\",\n                String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stderr)\n            ))\n        };\n    }\n    Err(format!(\"`{command:?}` failed to run (is it installed?)\"))\n}\n\n/// Tries to find a suitable python, which in Servo is always `uv run python`.\n///\n/// To be accommodating to different environments, which may manage python differently, we fallback\n/// to `python3` and `python` in that order.\n///\n/// Note: This function should be kept in sync with the version in `components/servo/build.rs`\nfn find_python() -> Command {\n    let mut command = Command::new(\"uv\");\n    command.args([\"run\", \"--frozen\", \"python\"]);\n\n    let command_result = try_python_command(command).inspect_err(|e| println!(\"cargo:warning={e}\"));\n    if let Ok(command) = command_result {\n        return command;\n    }\n\n    println!(\n        \"cargo:warning=`uv` not found - Falling back to the default python! \\\n        If the build fails, please install uv and make sure it is in your PATH or make sure \\\n        to provision a python environment >= python 3.11.\"\n    );\n\n    let python3 = Command::new(\"python3\");\n    let python3_result = try_python_command(python3);\n    if let Ok(command) = python3_result {\n        return command;\n    }\n\n    let python = Command::new(\"python\");\n    let python_result = try_python_command(python);\n    if let Ok(command) = python_result {\n        return command;\n    }\n\n    // We first try `python` before printing an error for `python3`, since python3 is often missing\n    // provided via python on Windows (but not necessarily on linux).\n    println!(\"cargo:warning={}\", python3_result.unwrap_err());\n    println!(\"cargo:warning={}\", python_result.unwrap_err());\n\n    panic!(\"No suitable python found! Tried: `uv run python`, `python3`, `python`.\");\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/components/script_bindings/build.rs",
    "numLines": 137,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 137
  },
  "type": "text"
}

    "content": "<!doctype html>\n<meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n<title>CSS Conditional Test: Parsing of container</title>\n<link rel=\"help\" href=\"https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-5/#container-name\">\n<link rel=\"help\" href=\"https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-5/#container-type\">\n<script src=\"/resources/testharness.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/resources/testharnessreport.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"/css/support/parsing-testcommon.js\"></script>\n<script src=\"support/cq-testcommon.js\"></script>\n<div id=\"target\"></div>\n<script>\nsetup(() => assert_implements_size_container_queries());\n\ntest_valid_value('container', 'initial');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'inherit');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'unset');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'revert');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'none');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'none / normal', 'none');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'inline-size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'none / inline-size', 'none / inline-size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'block-size / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'inline-size / inline-size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'size / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'foo');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'foo / normal', 'foo');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'foo bar / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'foo bar / normal', 'foo bar');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'FOO / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'FOO/size', 'FOO / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', '  FOO  /size', 'FOO / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'normal / size');\ntest_valid_value('container', 'auto / size');\n",

If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\n//! Utilities for querying the layout, as needed by layout.\nuse std::rc::Rc;\n\nuse app_units::Au;\nuse euclid::{Point2D, Rect, SideOffsets2D, Size2D};\nuse itertools::Itertools;\nuse layout_api::wrapper_traits::{LayoutNode, ThreadSafeLayoutElement, ThreadSafeLayoutNode};\nuse layout_api::{\n    AxesOverflow, BoxAreaType, LayoutElementType, LayoutNodeType, OffsetParentResponse,\n    PhysicalSides, ScrollContainerQueryFlags, ScrollContainerResponse,\n};\nuse paint_api::display_list::ScrollTree;\nuse script::layout_dom::{ServoLayoutNode, ServoThreadSafeLayoutNode};\nuse servo_arc::Arc as ServoArc;\nuse servo_geometry::{FastLayoutTransform, au_rect_to_f32_rect, f32_rect_to_au_rect};\nuse servo_url::ServoUrl;\nuse style::computed_values::display::T as Display;\nuse style::computed_values::position::T as Position;\nuse style::computed_values::visibility::T as Visibility;\nuse style::computed_values::white_space_collapse::T as WhiteSpaceCollapseValue;\nuse style::context::{QuirksMode, SharedStyleContext, StyleContext, ThreadLocalStyleContext};\nuse style::dom::{NodeInfo, TElement, TNode};\nuse style::properties::style_structs::Font;\nuse style::properties::{\n    ComputedValues, Importance, LonghandId, PropertyDeclarationBlock, PropertyDeclarationId,\n    PropertyId, ShorthandId, SourcePropertyDeclaration, parse_one_declaration_into,\n};\nuse style::selector_parser::PseudoElement;\nuse style::shared_lock::SharedRwLock;\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, Origin, UrlExtraData};\nuse style::stylist::RuleInclusion;\nuse style::traversal::resolve_style;\nuse style::values::computed::transform::Matrix3D;\nuse style::values::computed::{Float, Size};\nuse style::values::generics::font::LineHeight;\nuse style::values::generics::position::AspectRatio;\nuse style::values::specified::GenericGridTemplateComponent;\nuse style::values::specified::box_::DisplayInside;\nuse style::values::specified::text::TextTransformCase;\nuse style_traits::{CSSPixel, ParsingMode, ToCss};\n\nuse crate::ArcRefCell;\nuse crate::display_list::{StackingContextTree, au_rect_to_length_rect};\nuse crate::dom::NodeExt;\nuse crate::flow::inline::construct::{TextTransformation, WhitespaceCollapse, capitalize_string};\nuse crate::fragment_tree::{\n    BoxFragment, Fragment, FragmentFlags, FragmentTree, SpecificLayoutInfo, TextFragment,\n};\nuse crate::style_ext::ComputedValuesExt;\nuse crate::taffy::SpecificTaffyGridInfo;\n\n/// Get a scroll node that would represents this [`ServoLayoutNode`]'s transform and\n/// calculate its cumulative transform from its root scroll node to the scroll node.\nfn root_transform_for_layout_node(\n    scroll_tree: &ScrollTree,\n    node: ServoThreadSafeLayoutNode<'_>,\n) -> Option<FastLayoutTransform> {\n    let fragments = node.fragments_for_pseudo(None);\n    let box_fragment = fragments\n        .first()\n        .and_then(Fragment::retrieve_box_fragment)?\n        .borrow();\n    let scroll_tree_node_id = box_fragment.spatial_tree_node()?;\n    Some(scroll_tree.cumulative_node_to_root_transform(scroll_tree_node_id))\n}\n\npub(crate) fn process_padding_request(\n    node: ServoThreadSafeLayoutNode<'_>,\n) -> Option<PhysicalSides> {\n    let fragments = node.fragments_for_pseudo(None);\n    let fragment = fragments.first()?;\n    Some(match fragment {\n        Fragment::Box(box_fragment) | Fragment::Float(box_fragment) => {\n            let padding = box_fragment.borrow().padding;\n            PhysicalSides {\n                top: padding.top,\n                left: padding.left,\n                bottom: padding.bottom,\n                right: padding.right,\n            }\n        },\n        _ => Default::default(),\n    })\n}\n\npub(crate) fn process_box_area_request(\n    stacking_context_tree: &StackingContextTree,\n    node: ServoThreadSafeLayoutNode<'_>,\n    area: BoxAreaType,\n    exclude_transform_and_inline: bool,\n) -> Option<Rect<Au, CSSPixel>> {\n    let rects: Vec<_> = node\n        .fragments_for_pseudo(None)\n        .iter()\n        .filter(|fragment| {\n            !exclude_transform_and_inline ||",
    "filePath": "/workspace/components/layout/query.rs",

223. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "grep -A 20 \"pub(crate) fn process_scroll_container_query\" /workspace/components/layout/query.rs",
  "description": "Find scroll container query function"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "pub(crate) fn process_scroll_container_query(\n    node: Option<ServoLayoutNode<'_>>,\n    query_flags: ScrollContainerQueryFlags,\n    viewport_overflow: AxesOverflow,\n) -> Option<ScrollContainerResponse> {\n    let Some(node) = node else {\n        return Some(ScrollContainerResponse::Viewport(viewport_overflow));\n    };\n\n    let layout_data = node.to_threadsafe().inner_layout_data()?;\n\n    // 1. If any of the following holds true, return null and terminate this algorithm:\n    //  - The element does not have an associated box.\n    let layout_box = layout_data.self_box.borrow();\n    let layout_box = layout_box.as_ref()?;\n\n    let (style, flags) =\n        layout_box.with_base(|base| (base.style.clone(), base.base_fragment_info.flags))?;\n\n    // - The element is the root element.\n    // - The element is the body element."
}
